notes: Teams are keyed in Hoop Central by (league, slug) where slug = lowercase hyphenated usbasket TEAMNAME.
usbasket often renames the same school across eras (e.g. Youngstown St. -> YSU, Louisiana Tech -> La Tech).
aliasMap maps ingest slugs to a suggested canonical slug for DB merge / ingest normalization.
suspectedDuplicates are heuristic pairs — review before merging (abbrev collisions like LT include unrelated schools).
